members.name: AddResourceFormatSaver
members.summary: Registers a new [ResourceFormatSaver]. The ResourceSaver will use the ResourceFormatSaver as described in [method save]. This method is performed implicitly for ResourceFormatSavers written in GDScript (see [ResourceFormatSaver] for more information).

members.name: GetRecognizedExtensions
members.summary: Returns the list of extensions available for saving a resource of a given type.

members.name: GetResourceIdForPath
members.signature: public int GetResourceIdForPath(String path, bool generate)
members.summary: Returns the resource ID for the given path. If [param generate] is [code]true[/code], a new resource ID will be generated if one for the path is not found. If [param generate] is [code]false[/code] and the path is not found, [constant ResourceUID.INVALID_ID] is returned.

members.name: Save
members.signature: public int Save(Resource resource, String path, int flags)
members.summary: Saves a resource to disk to the given path, using a [ResourceFormatSaver] that recognizes the resource object. If [param path] is empty, [ResourceSaver] will try to use [member Resource.resource_path]. The [param flags] bitmask can be specified to customize the save behavior. Returns [constant OK] on success. [b]Note:[/b] When the project is running, any generated UID associated with the resource will not be saved as the required code is only executed in editor mode.

members.name: SetUid
members.signature: public int SetUid(String resource, int uid)
members.summary: Sets the UID of the given [param resource] path to [param uid]. You can generate a new UID using [method ResourceUID.create_id]. Since resources will normally get a UID automatically, this method is only useful in very specific cases.

values.name: FLAG_CHANGE_PATH
values.summary: Changes the [member Resource.resource_path] of the saved resource to match its new location.

values.name: FLAG_COMPRESS
values.summary: Compress the resource on save using [constant FileAccess.COMPRESSION_ZSTD]. Only available for binary resource types.

values.name: FLAG_OMIT_EDITOR_PROPERTIES
values.summary: Do not save editor-specific metadata (identified by their [code]__editor[/code] prefix).

values.name: FLAG_RELATIVE_PATHS
values.summary: Save the resource with a path relative to the scene which uses it.

values.name: FLAG_REPLACE_SUBRESOURCE_PATHS
values.summary: Take over the paths of the saved subresources (see [method Resource.take_over_path]).

constants.name: FLAG_RELATIVE_PATHS
constants.summary: Save the resource with a path relative to the scene which uses it.

constants.name: FLAG_CHANGE_PATH
constants.summary: Changes the [member Resource.resource_path] of the saved resource to match its new location.

constants.name: FLAG_OMIT_EDITOR_PROPERTIES
constants.summary: Do not save editor-specific metadata (identified by their [code]__editor[/code] prefix).

constants.name: FLAG_COMPRESS
constants.summary: Compress the resource on save using [constant FileAccess.COMPRESSION_ZSTD]. Only available for binary resource types.

constants.name: FLAG_REPLACE_SUBRESOURCE_PATHS
constants.summary: Take over the paths of the saved subresources (see [method Resource.take_over_path]).
